Questions & Answers

Frequently Asked Questions

### How does Stamp learn my preferences?

Stamp has three powerful features enabling that enable it to learn your preferences: Memories, AI Labels, and Context Search.

Memories: Stamp automatically creates memories about you and your contacts after every interaction, allowing it to maintain your full context and learn your preferences. You can also create or edit memories about yourself or a contact, and Stamp will automatically use these memories for all interactions.

AI Labels: You can configure AI labels in plain English and specify what actions Stamp should take on all emails that are categorized into that label.

Context Search: Stamp searches through your inbox and calendar to intelligently understand your writing style and availabilities before drafting replies or scheduling meetings.

### What is Stamp Mode?

### How does Stamp prioritize emails?

### Can I use my voice to talk to Stamp?

### Will Stamp work with existing email accounts?

### What email providers does Stamp support?

### Does Stamp store email content?

### Does Stamp offer Spam/Virus detection?

Ready To Transform Your Email?

Try Stamp for 30 days free. Experience what it's like to take control of your inbox and your day.

[Get Started Today](https://www.stampmail.ai/auth)![Get started with Stamp today.](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Finbox.3ca53269.png&w=2048&q=75)

![](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/static/media/stamp-partial-blue.6fc6f02a.svg)

Re: Project Proposal

Harold reached out regarding specifics on your upcoming presentation.

![](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/static/media/stamp-partial-blue.6fc6f02a.svg)

Re: Pull Request

Robert replied to your pull request suggestion with an alternate approach.

![](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/static/media/stamp-partial-blue.6fc6f02a.svg)

Re: Setting Up Stamp

George reached out to inquire about setting up Stamp for his team of 15 people.

![](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/static/media/stamp-partial-blue.6fc6f02a.svg)

Welcome to Stamp!

Archit reached out personally to welcome you to Stamp and highlight key features.

![](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/static/media/stamp-partial-blue.6fc6f02a.svg)

New Stamp Features

The Stamp team highlighted new features coming to Stamp that will further improve Stamp's email handling capabilities.

![](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/static/media/stamp-partial-blue.6fc6f02a.svg)

Re: Scheduling Product Sync

Steve sent across the agenda for the upcoming product sync and confirmed his availability.

![](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/static/media/stamp-partial-blue.6fc6f02a.svg)

Impressed With Stamp

James is highly impressed with Stamp's AI Secretary capabilities and proposed several potential new features.

![](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/static/media/stamp-partial-blue.6fc6f02a.svg)

Analytics Overview

You received a product analytics overview for your website, highlighting strong user growth and retention.

![Stamp, The AI Secretary that handles your email and calendar for you.](https://www.stampmail.ai/_next/static/media/stamp-full-blue.fe9a54e1.svg)
